raw_consumer_statement: This is an update to : COMPLAINT ID XXXX SUBMITTED ON XX/XX/year> Received a phone call from American Express XXXX XXXX @ XXXX on XXXX. She stated that I was still responsible for payment even though USPS told me there was no investigation. She said they can re open dispute if USPS responds to me. I clearly stated that I am NOT the shipper and there claim form clearly shows you need the original mailing receipt. Copies of my attempt to get information and requirements are attached. This does not make any sense when the shipper stated he would let me know any results of the USPS investigation and never did so.
